name: 1 Channel Zigbee Retrofit Dimmer

description.consumer:
The right light. Always.

Bright for the morning. Warm for the evening. The Dimmer learns when you want a room to feel different — and adjusts without you asking. Fits behind your existing switch. Works with your existing lights.
description.technical:
A single-channel Zigbee phase-cut dimmer module designed to retrofit any standard wall switch with intelligent brightness control — no switch replacement required.

Supports trailing and leading edge phase-cut dimming up to 200W for compatible dimmable lighting fixtures and drivers. Installs behind the existing switch in a flush box or on DIN rail. Communicates natively over Zigbee 3.0 with Home Assistant, and integrates with Matter and Apple HomeKit via a compatible hub.

Key Specifications
- Channels: 1
- Max Load: 200W
- Dimming Type: Phase-Cut (Trailing/Leading edge)
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Compatible with: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)
- Installation: Flush box or DIN rail

⚠ For use with dimmable fixtures and drivers only. Not a 0-10V controller and cannot function as a plain on/off relay.

specs.summary: Voltage: 90–250V AC | Max Power: 100W × 2CH (220V) | Wireless Protocol: Zigbee 3.0 | Operating Temperature: 0°C to +40°C | Case Temperature (Tc): +80°C Max | Dimensions: 40 × 40 × 18 mm | IP Rating: IP20 | Frequency Band: 2.405–2.480 GHz | Max Radio Transmit Power: <+10 dBm | Installation Type: Behind Switch / DIN Rail
specs.compatibility: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)

limitations: Compatible with dimmable loads only. Not a 0-10V controller. Does not function as a simple on/off relay.
dependencies: Zigbee coordinator or hub. Dimmable fixtures or drivers required.
